news.title: QUALCOMM (QCOM) Stock Just Lost Its Place In Several Russell Indices
news.summary: QUALCOMM (NasdaqGS:QCOM) has been removed from multiple Russell growth and value indices. The index changes follow a period of AI related announcements, infrastructure launches, partnerships, acquisitions and new revenue targets. news.title: QCOM Stock Slips Toward Fourth Straight Loss After Elon Musk Dismisses Reports Of SpaceX AI Phone Using Qualcomm Chips
news.summary: Elon Musk has denied a Wall Street Journal report that SpaceX showcased a prototype handset-like artificial intelligence device to investors that would use Qualcomm’s (QCOM) Snapdragon processor.
